scripts.bundle: esbuild src/handler.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --outfile=dist/handler.mjs --format=esm --external:@aws-sdk/* --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.fonts: rm -rf fonts && mkdir -p fonts && cp ../node_modules/@jimp/plugin-print/dist/fonts/open-sans/open-sans-64-white/* ../node_modules/@jimp/plugin-print/dist/fonts/open-sans/open-sans-64-black/* ../node_modules/@jimp/plugin-print/dist/fonts/open-sans/open-sans-32-white/* ../node_modules/@jimp/plugin-print/dist/fonts/open-sans/open-sans-32-black/* fonts/
scripts.package: npm run bundle && npm run fonts && bestzip lambda.zip dist/handler.mjs fonts
